description: No allowed-tools declared in frontmatter; command reads source files and system.md but tool access is undeclared

description: No allowed-tools declared; command loads a skill file via Read and may write system.md but tool access is undeclared

description: Scope section redirects to /frontend-design command which is not defined in this plugin or documented as a companion plugin
